The '''Tynnani system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Tynna sector/Legends|Tynna sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="AOC" /> It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]].<ref name="EGtPM" /> [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]] was in charge of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] operations there.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
